children.name: p
children.textContent: Based on what's in your kitchen right now

children.name: p
children.textContent: Wilted spinach, blistered cherry tomatoes, and garlic in a simple olive oil pasta. Uses your most urgent items.

children.name: svg

children.name: span
children.textContent: Baby Spinach · Cherry Tomatoes · Pasta · Garlic

children.name: p
children.textContent: Stovetop chicken thighs braised in leftover salsa with peas. Clears your most urgent protein and that open jar.
